title: DGCA Aircraft Maintenance Engineering (AME)
description: Comprehensive preparation for DGCA Aircraft Maintenance Engineer license examination. This course covers all required subjects including Airframe Systems, Powerplant, and Avionics.

title: FAA Private Pilot Ground School (PPL)
description: Complete ground school preparation for FAA Private Pilot Certificate. Covers aerodynamics, meteorology, navigation, and aviation regulations.

title: EASA Commercial Pilot License (CPL)
description: Advanced Commercial Pilot License theory following EASA standards. Comprehensive coverage of JAR-FCL requirements.

title: EASA ATPL Theory Complete
description: Complete Airline Transport Pilot License theory course following EASA standards. Highest level of pilot certification.

title: DGCA Navigator Certification
description: Specialized preparation for DGCA Navigator examination. Covers radio navigation, inertial navigation, and performance-based navigation.

title: FAA Instrument Rating
description: Prepare for FAA Instrument Rating. IFR procedures, instrument approaches, airway navigation, and instrument flight planning.

name: Capt. Rajesh Kumar
bio: Former Indian Air Force pilot with 25+ years of experience. Ex-DGCA examiner with extensive teaching experience.

name: Capt. Sarah Mitchell
bio: FAA Designated Pilot Examiner with 15 years of commercial aviation experience. Specialized in flight training and written exam preparation.

name: Capt. Hans Mueller
bio: EASA ATPL instructor with 20 years experience in European aviation. Former Airbus captain.

question: What is the eligibility criteria for DGCA AME course?
answer: Candidates must have completed 10+2 with Physics and Mathematics with minimum 50% marks. Age limit is 17-25 years.

question: How long does it take to complete DGCA AME course?
answer: The DGCA AME course typically takes 2-4 years depending on the training institute and category of license.

question: What payment methods are accepted?
answer: We accept all major credit/debit cards, UPI, net banking, and EMI options through Razorpay.

question: Is there a refund policy?
answer: Yes, we offer a 30-day money-back guarantee. Full refund if not satisfied with course content.

question: What is MCP examination pattern?
answer: MCP exams use negative marking. For DGCA, 0.25 negative marking per wrong answer. Passing marks are 70%.

question: How many attempts are allowed for DGCA exams?
answer: No limit on written exam attempts. Practical exams have specific validity periods.

question: How do I get my certificate after completion?
answer: Download certificate from dashboard. Includes QR code for verification.

question: Are the certificates recognized internationally?
answer: Certificates follow DGCA/FAA/EASA guidelines. Recognition depends on destination country's regulations.

title: New DGCA AME Batch Starting Soon
content: New batch launching soon. Early bird discount of 10% for registrations before March 31st.

title: Updated FAA Written Exam Pattern
content: FAA updated question patterns for PPL and IR exams. Our content has been updated accordingly.
